---
title: "image-banner"
editor: visual
---



```{=html}
</main>

<aside class="sidebar">

  <div class="sidebar-box news">
    <h3>News</h3>
    <p>Stay tuned for conference announcements and updates.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="sidebar-box">
    <h3>Important Dates</h3>
    <ul class="dates-list">
      <li><span class="date-label">Submission opens:</span> TBD</li>
      <li><span class="date-label">Submission deadline:</span> TBD</li>
      <li><span class="date-label">Notification:</span> TBD</li>
      <li><span class="date-label">Registration opens:</span> TBD</li>
      <li><span class="date-label">Conference:</span> 14–16 May 2027</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="sidebar-box">
    <h3>Local Attractions</h3>
    <div class="attraction">
      <img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/42/Toronto_-_ON_-_Toronto_Harbourfront7.jpg/320px-Toronto_-_ON_-_Toronto_Harbourfront7.jpg"
           alt="Toronto Waterfront" loading="lazy">
      <p class="caption">Toronto Waterfront</p>
    </div>
    <div class="attraction">
      <img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/00/Toronto_-_ON_-_CN_Tower_Close_Up.jpg/320px-Toronto_-_ON_-_CN_Tower_Close_Up.jpg"
           alt="CN Tower" loading="lazy">
      <p class="caption">CN Tower</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</aside>
</div>
```
